page_content:
Repeatable to: 6 credits.

DANC369 Special Topics in Study Abroad III (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.

DANC371 Somatics (3 Credits)

Current ideas and trends in dance technique, with a focus on the incorporation of dance science and somatics into dance training. Prerequisite: DANC179.
